channel.title: LLM Timeline — ICONNAI Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from ICONNAI.

item.title: ICONN-1 (ICONNAI)
item.description: Parameters: ICONN-1 License: open Type: model "ICONN-1 (this version) is optimized for natural, emotionally resonant, and conversational interactions. ICONN-e1 is a specialized variant of the model fine-tuned for advanced reasoning, critical analysis, and complex problem-solving."
